_comment: Update this file to reflect project changes. The index.html reads it automatically. Dates use YYYY-MM-DD format. Status: green | amber | red. Phase examples: Active Development | Testing | Deployed / Monitoring | On Hold | Archived.

projects.name: avid-automation
projects.description: Automates Avid Media Composer project creation for the Assistant Editor team — clones season templates, builds folder trees, creates fresh bins, and adds writer-producer folders on demand throughout the season.
projects.notes: Core implementation complete. Deployed to AE team. Holding for longer-term feedback before planning version updates. Show-specific data lives outside the repo in gitignored local_data/.

projects.name: end-credits-tool
projects.description: Adobe After Effects CEP panel + Python backend that converts TV end-credit source documents (PDF/DOCX/XLSX/TXT) into timed, tab-separated output for the end_credits_v5.jsx AE script. Supports deterministic per-show parsers, AI-assisted extraction, Airtable integration, and frame-math automation.
projects.notes: v0.4.1 rolling out to PPC group for testing. Focus is collecting feedback and building deterministic parsers for remaining daytime/primetime shows. Improvement work is now tracked under the related end-credits-improvement-roadmap project.
subtasks: Build deterministic parsers for remaining shows
Collect and integrate PPC feedback on v0.4.1
Verified-bed engine (item 3: verified bed as baseline)

activityLog.note: Fire Country deterministic PDF parser shipped (95.9 STRICT on real source); purged leaky Ghosts/Georgie .xls parsers (data leakage)
v0.4.1 – Rebalance now preserves legal + mandatory card timing
v0.4.0 – Deterministic cast-roll grouping; cast card frame minimums
v0.3.0 – PPC striping model for frame math; striping calculator panel
v0.2.1 – Editor mode (baseline-seeded prompt); name-gate fixes
v0.2.0 – First versioned release: primetime baseline, name-safety gate, Show Admin, Airtable, PPC installer
Pre-release: Airtable integration and panel packaging

projects.name: end-credits-improvement-roadmap
projects.description: Cross-show accuracy program for the End Credits Tool: improve credit extraction via three levers - frame timing (the universal last stage that runs after every method), deterministic-parser accuracy (name/role, card order, legal block, card count, groupings, verbatim text fidelity), and new parsers built assisted-first then promoted to deterministic when the source format allows. Sequenced by Start-of-Production dates. Related to the end-credits-tool project.
projects.notes: Follow-on to the Model Improvement Program. Guardrail: parsers read the approval-credits PDF source, never the verified .xls output (the leakage purged 2026-06-30). Live roadmap: the show-improvement-roadmap canvas + the end_credits_improvement_roadmap Cursor plan. Daytime shows are prioritized first for continuous frame-logic tuning.
subtasks: Daytime (PIR, B&B, Y&R, Beyond the Gates, LMAD): frame-weighting gate tuning + parser edge cases
Sheriff Country S02: deterministic parser (ALL-CAPS approval-PDF cluster)
NCIS S24 / New York / Origins: probe format -> parser or assisted prompt
Marshals S02: probe format -> parser or assisted prompt
Tracker S04: assisted prompt + finisher (mixed-case source)
Fire Country S05: mine frame profile + run gate to lift dFRAME
Elsbeth / Boston Blue / FBI: assisted prompt as verified beds arrive
Panel: paired source<->result highlight for PPCs (feasibility, pending feedback)

activityLog.note: Roadmap created; three-lever model agreed; daytime prioritized first; Fire Country parser shipped (95.9); Ghosts/Georgie deferred
